content: Added Google Analytics tracking code to index.html to monitor website traffic and user interactions.

Updated the skill search functionality in skillSearch.js to ensure that the displayed skills are unique and randomly sorted, improving the user experience by showing a diverse set of skills each time.
Updated **Highlights** section to include more specific tech focus areas and adjusted the layout for better responsiveness.
Formatted plain text for better readability by encoding HTML characters to prevent XSS attacks and converting Markdown bold syntax into HTML tags.
Refined the **Profile** component to enhance mobile viewing experience by changing the flex direction to column on smaller screens.
Improved the **Updates** component's responsiveness by allowing update items to take up 50% width on smaller screens, ensuring a better display on mobile devices.
Added **More project coming soon** animation to indicate upcoming content in the Projects section.
